summary: Iteration 51: Priority 3-6 Analytics Features - All tests passed. Currency fix (₹ not $) verified across all pages. Revenue Forecast, Commission Analytics, Country/Product Analytics with partner drill-down, Revenue Dashboard with By Currency tab all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing approved sales data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested Priority 3-6 analytics features. All working: (1) Currency Fix - ₹ symbol used across RevenueForecasting, CommissionAnalytics, CountryProductAnalytics, RevenueDashboard, AnalyticsDashboard, (2) Revenue Forecast - shows ₹21L avg monthly, 0% growth, ₹5.2L pipeline, STABLE trend, historical + forecast chart, (3) Commission Analytics - shows ₹1.14L total commission, 2 partners (Partner User ₹99,927.5, muskhan ₹15,000), monthly trend chart, (4) Country/Product Analytics - By Country/By Product toggle, partner drill-down table with per-partner sales/revenue/received/commission, Export CSV button, (5) Revenue Dashboard - By Currency tab shows INR/Domestic breakdown (31 sales, ₹21L revenue, ₹8.4L received), (6) Analytics Dashboard - Back button present at /admin/analytics.

currency_fix.details: All pages show ₹ symbol instead of $. Verified in RevenueForecasting.jsx, CommissionAnalytics.jsx, CountryProductAnalytics.jsx, RevenueDashboard.jsx, AnalyticsDashboard.jsx

revenue_forecast.details: API returns historical + forecast data with real approved sales. Shows Avg Monthly Revenue (₹2,102,100), Growth Rate (0%), Pipeline Value (₹522,500), Trend badge (STABLE), Historical + Forecast chart

commission_analytics.details: API returns partner breakdown with commission_amount field. Shows Total Commission (₹114,927.5), 2 Active Partners, Monthly Commission Trend chart, Partner breakdown with per-partner commission amounts

country_product_analytics.details: API returns by_country and by_product with partners array. UI shows By Country/By Product toggle, click to expand shows Partner Breakdown table with per-partner sales/revenue/received/commission, Export CSV button works

revenue_dashboard_by_currency.details: API returns by_currency array with INR/Domestic breakdown. UI shows By Currency tab with Sales (31), Revenue (₹2,102,100), Received (₹843,290)

analytics_dashboard_back_button.details: Back button present at /admin/analytics with data-testid='analytics-back-btn'

frontend_tests_summary.revenue_forecast_page: PASS - ₹ symbol, Avg Monthly Revenue, Growth Rate, Pipeline Value, Trend badge, Historical + Forecast chart
frontend_tests_summary.commission_analytics_page: PASS - ₹ symbol, Total Commission, Partner breakdown, Monthly trend chart
frontend_tests_summary.country_product_page: PASS - ₹ symbol, By Country/By Product toggle, Partner drill-down table, Export CSV button
frontend_tests_summary.revenue_dashboard_page: PASS - ₹ symbol, By Currency tab with INR/Domestic breakdown

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
